document: Rail Button 1010: Standard rail button for 1010 8020 aluminum extrusion launch rail. Button width 9.0mm fits 1010 T-slot. Mounted to rocket body tube with single screw through center. Guides rocket along launch rail, releases cleanly at lift-off. Material: delrin. Rail size: 1010. Use cases: launch rail guide, launch lug replacement. Geometry source: build123d==0.10.0.
